name: Earth
desc: You are from Earth.

push_stages.prompt: What part of Earth are you from?

name: The Green Zone
desc: The Terran Federation green zone, where there is at least some semblance of peace and stability.

name: The Dead Zone
desc: One of the fortresses in the dead zone. Food is scarce and life is precarious.

name: Frontier
desc: I was born in a small town on the edge of civilization.

push_stages.prompt: How was growing up in your frontier town?

name: City
desc: I was born in a city and led an average life there.

push_stages.prompt: What part of the city were you raised in?

name: Idealist
desc: My ancestry includes a significant amount of genetic engineering.

[LPB_INTRO]: As a child, you began to show exceptional abilities.
You come from a long line of idealists, and your family had great expectations for you.

push_stages.prompt: How did you perform in school?

name: Outcast
desc: I have always lived on the fringes of society.

[LPB_INTRO]: From birth, you never really fit in with your peers.
Your early life was spent on the fringes of society.

push_stages.prompt: What is it that set you apart from your peers?

name: Orphan
desc: I lost my parents at a young age.

[LPB_INTRO]: Your parents died when you were very young.
You were raised in an orphanage and never knew your parents.
You were left on the doorstop of an orphanage in [town].
Your parents were killed in an attack by [enemies].

push_stages.prompt: How did you cope with the loss of your parents?

name: Close Community
desc: Life was hard, but everyone helped everyone else out.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Your community was very close knit.

name: Boring Life
desc: Mostly it was boring; I longed to escape.

[LPB_DETAILS]: As a child you dreamed of leaving home and going on big adventures.
Growing up, you always dreamed of escape.

name: Dangerous Place
desc: Our village was always under threat.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Your community was under constant attack by [enemies].

name: Crime Alley
desc: I lived in a rough part of town; gangs ruled the streets.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Your home was in the bad side of town; you quickly learned to keep a low profile.
Your neighborhood was riddled with crime. To survive, you had to keep your head down.

name: Good Neighborhood
desc: I lived in a nice part of town.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Your neighborhood was nice enough.
Your family's home was on the rich side of town.
Overall, you had a happy childhood.

name: Cosmopolitan City
desc: I lived in a diverse neighborhood, mingling with different cultures and people from all parts of human space.

[LPB_DETAILS]: You grew up in a multicultural area, surrounded by immigrants from all over human space.
Your home was in the trading district, where you became familiar with many cultures.

name: Overachiever
desc: I was very competitive; every subject was a challenge to be mastered.

[LPB_DETAILS]: In school you were very competitive. Every subject was a challenge to be mastered.

name: Slacker
desc: My natural talents made me lazy at school.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Because of your natural talents, you never had to work as hard as your peers.
Your genetic enhancements meant you never had to push yourself.

name: Tekno
desc: When my aptitude for computers was discovered, I was put to work as a tekno.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Your exceptional aptitude for computers led to you being inducted as a tekno.
From a young age you were put to work maintaining the tech of your community.
You feel more comfortable with machines than with other humans.

name: Star Student
desc: My abilities gave me more free time to live- meeting friends, joining clubs, entering contests.

[LPB_DETAILS]: You became a star student, running for class president and taking part in many activities.
You used your free time to tutor classmates and help out around town.
Your abilities made you a natural leader, forming teams to take part in [school_contest].

name: Found Family
desc: I took comfort in my friends and caretakers.

[LPB_DETAILS]: You were like a surrogate parent to the other orphans.
Over time, you found a new family in your friends and caretakers.
You were adopted by a family who cared for you deeply.

name: Lonely Road
desc: I kept to myself, and still don't get close to people.

[LPB_DETAILS]: You were adopted by a family that neglected you.
You shut yourself off from human connections.

name: Child Labor
desc: Having no family to take me, I was sent to work right away.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Without any means to support yourself, you were taken to serve as the town's buttonpresser.
Lacking any family to look after you, you were taken in as a junior laborer by the local factory.

name: Cultural Exchange
desc: Having no family to look after me, I was sent on a cultural exchange program to the L5 spinners.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Lacking any other family, you were sent as a cultural exchange student to an L5 space colony.
You were sent to an L5 space colony to be raised alongside a creche of similarly aged children.

name: Juvenile Delinquent
desc: I got started in crime at a young age.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Even as a child you were constantly in trouble with the law.
You joined a gang and started committing petty crimes.

name: Ravager
desc: I was born into a nomad ravager caravan.

[LPB_DETAILS]: You grew up in a ravager caravan, constantly moving through the deadzone.
Your family are ravagers, nomads of the deadzone.

name: Lunar Refugee
desc: My family fled Luna during the war of unification.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Your parents were refugees from Luna who faced much discrimination on Earth.
You are a Lunar refugee, your family having fled the Aegis regime.

name: Obvious Mutation
desc: I have visible genetic mutations.

[LPB_DETAILS]: You were born with [mutation].
As you grew up, you developed [mutation].

name: Militia
desc: I joined the military and learned how to fight.

[LPC_INTRO]: When [crisis], you joined the militia in [city].
As soon as you were old enough to pilot a mecha, you signed up with [the_army].

push_stages.prompt: What was your position in the army?

name: Combat Pilot
desc: I was just a grunt.

[LPC_DETAILS]: You helped defend [town] against [enemies].
You fought [enemies].

name: Technician
desc: I was a field tech.

[LPC_DETAILS]: Your skill as a field tech helped keep your lance in the fight.
As a technician you didn't see much action, you just had to clean up the mess when it was over.

name: Scout
desc: I was a recon pilot.

[LPC_DETAILS]: Your skill as a recon pilot saved your lance on several occassions.
You infiltrated enemy lines as a recon pilot.

name: EWS Pilot
desc: I was an electronic warfare specialist.

[LPC_DETAILS]: More than once your almost-magical skill with computers helped your team survive a tough battle.
As the team's electronic warfare specialist you helped guide and defend your team mates.

name: Mech Hunter
desc: I was a mecha hunter.

[LPC_DETAILS]: You became your unit's most feared mecha hunter, dispatching enemies at close range.
Soon you gained a reputation for brutally striking down enemy leaders in close combat.

name: Sniper
desc: I was a sniper, specializing in covert ops.

[LPC_DETAILS]: You were trained as a sniper, remaining unseen while dispatching enemy meks.
In combat, you discovered a knack for eliminating enemy units without being seen.

name: University
desc: I studied at a prestigious university.

[LPC_INTRO]: After high school you went to university.
You finished high school early and entered university in your mid teens.
[LPC_DETAILS]: You majored in [major] and minored in [minor].
You studied [major] and [minor].

push_stages.prompt: What was your major in university?
What was your minor in university?

name: Medicine
desc: I majored in medicine.

name: Science
desc: I majored in science.

name: Engineering
desc: I majored in engineering.

name: Coding
desc: I minored in coding.

name: Performing Arts
desc: I minored in performing arts.

name: Management
desc: I minored in management.

name: Archaeology
desc: I minored in archaeology.

name: Physical Education
desc: I minored in physical education.

name: Autodidact
desc: I am a self taught expert in my chosen field.

[LPC_INTRO]: You completed your education using books and old datafiles.
You spurned higher education in favor of studying by yourself.
Pushed by your obsessions, you became an expert in your chosen field.

name: Music
desc: I was obsessed with music.

[LPC_DETAILS]: Every night you practiced the [instrument], working hard to perfect your technique.

name: Lost Technology
desc: I learned as much as possible about PreZero tech, especially the lost art of biotechnology.

[LPC_DETAILS]: You sought out esoteric tomes to learn the forbidden art of biotechnology.
Your search for the lost science of biotechnology took you to ancient libraries and prezero ruins.

name: The Underworld
desc: As a young adult, I got involved in some dangerous business.

[LPC_INTRO]: To make ends meet, you got involved in crime.
You started committing crimes before you were old enough to really understand the consequences.

push_stages.prompt: What sort of criminal activity were you involved in?

name: Sneak Thief
desc: I was a thief.

[LPC_DETAILS]: You became a notorious thief, easily able to slip past guards.
You became a cat burgular, stealing priceless treasures as their owners slept just meters away.
You took up shoplifting. Although this wasn't a lucrative career, it paid the bills.

name: Hacking
desc: I was a computer hacker.

[LPC_DETAILS]: Online you were known as [Adjective] [Noun], [LPC_HAKN_DESC].

name: Enforcer
desc: I worked as hired muscle for gangsters.

[LPC_DETAILS]: You worked as an enforcer for [LPC_BOSS], cybering yourself up to better fit the role.
You made a lot of money acting as a cyber-enforcer for [LPC_BOSS].
You were badly injured during a botched mission and needed cybernetic reconstruction.

name: Survival
desc: Life was tough. All I could do was to survive, and then just barely.

[LPC_INTRO]: Despite all the obstacles the world threw at you, you refused to give up.
Through perserverance you managed to survive and prosper under terrible circumstances.

push_stages.prompt: What allowed you to get through this period?

name: Fast Talker
desc: I learned to talk my way out of bad situations.

[LPC_DETAILS]: Thanks to your fast wits, you could talk your way out of most bad situations.
You discovered a talent for negotiation. With nothing more than a golden tongue, you soon began to climb the heap.

name: Animal Companion
desc: I had a dog who kept me safe.

[LPC_DETAILS]: Fortunately, you had a big dog who protected you until you were big enough to look after yourself.
When you were targeted by [badguys], it was a stray dog that came to your defense.

name: War
desc: Everything got put on hold when open warfare broke out.

[LPD_INTRO]: Your home was destroyed in an enemy attack, forcing you to fight for your life.
When [enemies] attacked your neighborhood, fighting became a matter of survival.

push_stages.prompt: What did you do during the war?

name: Lostech Hunting
desc: I sought info about PreZero bioweapons to aid my side.

[LPD_DETAILS]: Hearing rumors of reawakened bioweapons, you were sent to learn what you could about these ancient threats.
As news arrived of reawakened bioweapons, your knowledge of lost technology became highly valuable.

name: Field Medic
desc: I used my medical knowledge to help those injured in the fighting.

[LPD_DETAILS]: You acted as a battlefield medic, trying to save as many of the injured as you could.

name: Specialist Pilot
desc: I fought, using my talents as an EW specialist.

[LPD_DETAILS]: Your expertise at electronic warfare came in handy during the fighting.
You joined a defense squad as their ECM specialist.

name: Revenge Road
desc: Consumed by rage, I set out to destroy the enemy.

[LPD_DETAILS]: You lost yourself to anger, living only to defeat the enemy that had taken so much from you.
You spent the war fighting, throwing yourself into battle without any care for self preservation.

name: Poverty
desc: I lost whatever money I once had, and landed in dire straits.

[LPD_INTRO]: With no money and no options, you were forced to leave home.
Unfortunately, the money you were counting on never started to pour in.

push_stages.prompt: How did you survive during this time?

name: Mercenary
desc: I became a soldier of fortune.

[LPD_DETAILS]: You became a mercenary, selling your skills to the highest bidder.
You traveled the solar system as a mercenary, seeking out trouble spots for your next big contract.

name: Organized Crime
desc: I stole what I needed to survive.

[LPD_DETAILS]: During this time, you did some things you aren't proud of just to survive.
Around this time, you did a number of things that aren't technically legal.

name: Survivalist
desc: I went off-grid, leading a sustenance lifestyle.

[LPD_DETAILS]: With no posessions to hold you down, you lived off the land.
You lived by the traditional ways of your people: hunting, foraging, and seeking PreZero caches of canned food.

name: Corporate Drone
desc: I took the only job available to me.

[LPD_DETAILS]: You worked fora corporate support line, handling calls deemed too insignificant to pass on to the computer.
You got an meaningless office job at a small corporation, but dreamed of escape.

name: Destiny
desc: I felt a calling that I couldn't ignore.

[LPD_INTRO]: You always felt that you were destined for greater things.
One time, you left all of that to go fulfil your destiny.

name: Golden Tongue
desc: I am both a problem solver and a troublemaker.

[LPD_DETAILS]: You talked a [client] into giving you a free mecha, and set out to become a cavalier.

name: Mecha Maniac
desc: I was born to pilot mecha.

[LPD_DETAILS]: You spent your life savings on a new mecha and became a cavalier.
Inspired by the action shows of your childhood, you gave up your mundane life to become a cavalier.

name: Bounty Hunter
desc: I became a bounty hunter.

[LPD_DETAILS]: You pledged your life to fight criminals in the name of great justice.
You got a bounty hunting license and started adventuring.

name: Pop Singing Pilot
desc: I could never silence the song in my heart.

[LPD_DETAILS]: You began recording music, seeking fame as a cavalier idol star.

name: Betrayal
desc: I was betrayed by someone close to me.

[LPD_INTRO]: During an important mission, you were betrayed by a friend.
On your first mission as a cavalier, you were betrayed by your mentor.

push_stages.prompt: What was your reaction to this betrayal?

name: Get Even
desc: I will get strong enough to defeat them.

[LPD_DETAILS]: You swore to train until you are strong enough to enact revenge.
You promised that one day you will get even.

name: Caution
desc: I must never let my guard down again.

[LPD_DETAILS]: Following this, you swore to never let your guard down again.
Since that time you've been cautious about other people.
You never saw it coming.

name: Arm and a Leg
desc: They left me for dead; I needed cybernetic surgery to survive.

[LPD_DETAILS]: You were scarred both mentally and physically.
They left you for dead, but with some new augmentations you survived.

name: Failure
desc: I failed at an important task, and now bear the responsibility for the consequences.

[LPD_INTRO]: Unfortunately, your plans for life were upturned by a single mistake.
Just when your life started looking up, a single accident turned everything upside down.

push_stages.prompt: What sort of failure did you experience?

name: Shadow of Death
desc: My friend died and I couldn't save them.

[LPD_DETAILS]: A routine mission went bad. One of your lancemates was critically injured, and you couldn't save [object_pronoun].
Your friend got shot during a mission. You tried to save [object_pronoun], but failed.

name: One Hit Wonder
desc: My music career went nowhere.

[LPD_DETAILS]: You decided to start a band. Your one and only single ended up the most hated song of NT154.
You accepted a recording contract before you were ready for the bigtime and ended up a has-been before you even got a chance to start.

name: Easy Come, Easy Go
desc: I've had many failures but I don't let them get me down.

[LPD_DETAILS]: Despite many failures, you keep trying.
Still, you keep going.

name: Resolution: Duty
desc: I know no life other than being a cavalier, and live in strict adherence to the Cavalier Code.

[LPE_DETAILS]: You strive every day to fulfil your duty as a cavalier.
Life so far has taught you the importance of responsibility. You accept your duty with steely resolve.

name: Resolution: Fellowship
desc: I swear to never harm others in the way I have been harmed.

[LPE_DETAILS]: Having suffered betrayal, you vow to be a loyal friend yourself.
You promise never to harm others as you have been harmed yourself, and choose to honor the virtue of fellowship.

name: Resolution: Fellowship
desc: I choose to build bridges instead of just blowing them up.

[LPE_DETAILS]: If life has taught you anything, it's that we're all in this together. You strive to honor this fellowship with other cavaliers.
These days, you enjoy being a cavalier mostly for the fellowship.

name: Resolution: Justice
desc: I have sworn to uphold the principles of justice.

[LPE_DETAILS]: Now, you have dedicated your life to the pursuit of justice.
Following that, you pledged yourself to the quest for justice. This is the principle that motivates you as a cavalier.

name: Resolution: Glory
desc: I seek a life of danger and excitement. Riches and fame would be pretty good too.

[LPE_DETAILS]: Now, you have dedicated your life to seeking adventure and glory.
So far you haven't had great success, but you know it's only a matter of time before you're number one!

name: Resolution: Peace
desc: I vow to protect the weak, and prevent tragedies like those I've witnessed from happening again.

[LPE_DETAILS]: Now, you have dedicated your life to peace and protecting the powerless.
These days you work to protect people and stop tragedies like those you've witnessed from happening again.
